description: Becky Edwards joined the Further Education (FE) Commissioner team in 2020 as an FE Adviser. She was appointed Deputy FE Commissioner in September 2023. She is a qualified accountant and has a master’s degree in financial management. She has worked in senior finance roles in the FE sector for over 25 years, including: Executive Director of Finance, City of Bristol College Executive Director of Finance, Strode College

details.body:
Becky Edwards joined the Further Education (FE) Commissioner team in 2020 as an FE Adviser. She was appointed Deputy FE Commissioner in September 2023.

She is a qualified accountant and has a master’s degree in financial management.

She has worked in senior finance roles in the FE sector for over 25 years, including:

  • Executive Director of Finance, City of Bristol College
  • Executive Director of Finance, Strode College

Becky Edwards joined the Further Education (FE) Commissioner team in 2020 as an FE Adviser. She was appointed Deputy FE Commissioner in September 2023.

She is a qualified accountant and has a master’s degree in financial management.

She has worked in senior finance roles in the FE sector for over 25 years, including:

  • Executive Director of Finance, City of Bristol College
  • Executive Director of Finance, Strode College

The Deputy FE Commissioners work with FE colleges to help improve the quality and sustainability of their provision, and reduce the risk of failure. This includes:

  • providing support to colleges in intervention
  • preventing colleges from going into intervention
  • contributing to policy development for colleges in the FE sector

More information is available in the college oversight: support and intervention guide.

role_appointments.title: Becky Edwards - Deputy Further Education Commissioner

title: Becky Edwards
